name: font_size_bare_range

meta.note: [provenance:reference-impl-aligned §6.17 + AOZORA-ANNOTATION 2026-06-17] ［＃N段階小さな文字］ ... ［＃小さな文字終わり］ is the bare-range form (rendered as a font-size block container) of the relative font-size shift, with neither ここから nor ここで — the container counterpart of the forward-reference 「X」はN段階小さな文字 leaf; it renders to the same inline aozora-font-smaller span. ~9k paired occurrences in the corpus (more common than the ここから block form). Offsets from the §3 byte model; expected captured from the aozora #114/#118 reference implementation (the project's canonical processor).

source: 本文［＃1段階小さな文字］小さい［＃小さな文字終わり］後

expected.html:
本文

小さい

後
expected.serialize:
本文

［＃ここから1段階小さな文字］

小さい

［＃ここで小さな文字終わり］

後
